text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Food > Fresh Food * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients sh Food Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF FARMERS MARKET FUND DOUBLE UP FOOD BUCKS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Allows people to double SNAP dollars to spend on fresh produce at participating farmers markets, CSAs (community-supported agriculture), farm stands, and grocery stores. Website Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: SNAP recipients Hours: Varies Email (503) 208-4495 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FARMERS MARKET FUND PRODUCE MATCH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF If a person receives cash benefits on their Oregon Trail card rather than SNAP (food) benefits, they are eligible to participate in the Produce Match program. This program allows people to double SNAP cash dollars to spend on fresh produce at participating farmers markets. Website Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: EBT Cash recipients Hours: Varies Email (503) 208-4495 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FARMERS MARKET FUND DOUBLE UP FOOD BUCKS
